name: infinito-bluesky-login-broker
description: OIDC → Bluesky-PDS app-password broker. Auto-provisions a PDS account on first visit, stores the AES-256-GCM-encrypted app-password as a Keycloak user attribute, and hands off a valid Bluesky session to the social-app web client without ever exposing the password to the browser. Per requirement 013 web-app-bluesky per-role notes (variant A+).
